nasb.text: Hear the sound of the cry of the shepherds, And the wailing of the masters of the flock! For the Lord is destroying their pasture,

esv.text: A voice—the cry of the shepherds, and the wail of the lords of the flock! For the Lord is laying waste their pasture,

cnv.text: 聽啊！牧人的哀叫， 羊群的領袖的悲號， 因為耶和華正在毀壞他們的牧場。

ccb.text: 听听牧人的哭喊， 百姓首领的哀号吧， 因为耶和华正在毁灭他们的家园。
